verdict.claim: HS-JEPA core modules change the real sleep-adapter action boundary when removed. This makes listener responsibility, action-health, and invariant energy falsifiable rather than only descriptive.
verdict.failure_interpretation: If all module-removal variants match or beat full-core release on public LB, the current HS-JEPA core is over-constrained for the competition adapter.

module_ablation_design.candidate_universe: decoder-order strict cells plus boundary tomography rejected cells
module_ablation_design.full_core: listener responsibility + action health + invariant energy

findings.claim: no_listener_responsibility is a real HS-JEPA module ablation, not a cosmetic label.
findings.next_test: Use public LB only for a high-information counterfactual if this ablation ranks high while changing many cells.

findings.claim: no_action_health is a real HS-JEPA module ablation, not a cosmetic label.
findings.next_test: Use public LB only for a high-information counterfactual if this ablation ranks high while changing many cells.

config.name: full_core_reference
config.risk_role: baseline full HS-JEPA core boundary on strict plus weak-consensus cells

config.name: invariant_only
config.risk_role: tests whether low invariant energy alone is enough without listener/action-health

config.name: no_action_health
config.risk_role: tests whether route/fusion evidence alone over-releases without action-health

config.name: no_listener_responsibility
config.risk_role: tests whether listener responsibility is actually needed for action authority

config.name: no_invariant_energy
config.risk_role: tests whether high-health actions become toxic when invariant energy is ignored
